name: Chocolate Wafer Crust
recipeInstructions: Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter, mixing well until evenly combined. Firmly press the crumb mixture into an ungreased 9-inch pie plate, ensuring it covers the bottom and sides completely. For frozen pies, the crust can be used without baking. For other types of pies, bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 to 8 minutes. Yield: one 9-inch crust.
